title: pyrus calleryana var. lanceata
intro: Pyrus calleryana var. lanceata, also known as the callery pear or lanceleaf callery pear, is a deciduous tree native to China and Korea. It is valued for its ornamental and medicinal properties, with a bark and leaves rich in flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The medicinal properties of Pyrus calleryana var. lanceata include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial and antiviral activities. This plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which have been reported to have health benefits including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting immune function.
